summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are available or safe under this job. Useful open PRs remain open; issue refs linked from candidate PRs remain open behind their active fix paths.
